April 2026 · v1.0

Orbit
Growth Marketing Proposal

A full-funnel strategy to cut CAC, lift activation, and compound user LTV — built for Orbit's next 12 months.

Our Philosophy

Data that tells a story.
Creative that makes you want to listen.

We build systems, not campaigns. Specialists, not generalists. Evidence-driven decisions, not instincts dressed up as strategy. For Orbit, that means one thing: scalable growth with no wasted spend.

The Challenge

High acquisition cost.
Low activation rate.

Orbit acquires 4,200+ signups monthly, but only 31% complete onboarding within 7 days. CAC sits at $68 — 2.1× the fintech industry median. Every month without a fix costs Orbit ~$180k in wasted acquisition spend.

$68
Current CAC
31%
Activation rate D7
2.1×
Industry CAC benchmark

/01

Paid acquisition inefficiency

Poor audience segmentation inflates CPL 38% vs. benchmarks across Meta and Google UAC.

/02

KYC drop-off at step 3

69% of signups abandon before linking a bank account. No re-engagement sequence exists.

/03

Zero lifecycle automation

Post-activation email is batch-and-blast. No behavioral triggers, no product-led upsell.

Built to compound.

Scope

What we'll do for Orbit.

/01

Paid Acquisition

Meta, Google UAC, Apple Search Ads. Full-funnel architecture, LTV-based bidding, weekly creative refresh cycle.

/02

Onboarding Recovery

5-touch SMS + email re-engagement for KYC drop-offs. Target: lift activation from 31% → 52% within 90 days.

/03

Lifecycle Automation

Klaviyo behavioral flows triggered by deposits, portfolio milestones, and referral events. AUM lift: +18% net.

/04

CRO & Experimentation

Landing page A/B testing, onboarding flow analysis, KYC friction reduction. 2 live experiments per month.

/05

Analytics & Attribution

GA4 + Amplitude integration. Custom CAC/LTV dashboard. Bi-weekly executive reports with actionable next steps.

/06

Creative Production

UGC, motion, AI-assisted scale. Fintech creator network (Tier 2–3) for organic amplification.

Process

A five-phase methodology.

  1. 01. Audit & Competitive Landscape— Days 1–14
  2. 02. ICP Segmentation & Buyer Journey Mapping— Days 15–28
  3. 03. Media Strategy, Channel Architecture & Creative Rollout— Month 2
  4. 04. Launch: Campaigns Live, KYC Recovery Deployed, Lifecycle On— Month 3
  5. 05. Optimize, Scale Winners, Compound Growth— Months 4–12
